title: 3. San Cha San Points (A. 02 /03 /04)
text:
Or fist points (picture on page 7) in addition to having a tremendous effect on boosting
the immune system, are effective in strengthening the lungs, heart, kidneys and spleen,
As you can see in the picture, these points can affect a wide range of symptoms and
diseases, since the corona virus affects many organs of the body, so using a
combination of these points can be effective and helpful for all Patients ;
 Headaches
 Severe cold symptoms
 Sore throat
 Fatigue and general pain
 Problems of vital organs of the body
 And subclinical diseases
Are a small part of the practical indications of these powerful and valuable points.
